summary: LOTTOLAB Agent PAGE Iteration 13 Testing Complete - 18/18 backend tests passed (100%), 16/16 frontend tests passed (100%). Tested agent login, public ticket verification, all 6 agent menu items navigation, quick amount section removed, search tickets with duplicate feature, available draws with countdown, ticket cancellation 5-minute rule.

minor.issue: enabled_lotteries array is empty - no lotteries configured for the agent's company. This is expected if no lotteries have been enabled in Company Settings.

integration_issues.issue: Lottery dropdown shows 'Choisir une loterie' but no options available because enabled_lotteries is empty in device config. Needs company admin to enable lotteries.

action_items: Enable lotteries for LotoPam Demo company in Company Settings to fully test ticket creation flow
No critical bugs found - all implemented features working as expected
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing agent credentials
context_for_next_testing_agent: All agent features tested successfully. The agent menu has 7 items (Dashboard + 6 feature pages). Quick amounts section is removed from New Ticket page - only manual amount entry. Public ticket verification works at /api/verify-ticket/{code}. Print endpoint requires auth. 5-minute void window is configured correctly.
